script_checks.name: parses_all_12_vars
script_checks.evidence: Default JSON contains all 12 keys; full-override JSON shows all 12 custom values correctly parsed. Verified: orchestrator_provider, executor_provider, executor_mode, executor_thinking, reviewer_provider, reviewer_mode, reviewer_thinking, notify_on_finish, fanout_subagents, subagent_workspace, heartbeat_cron, heartbeat_max_runs.

script_checks.name: json_schema_valid
script_checks.evidence: Default: {"executor_thinking":null,"heartbeat_max_runs":null,"notify_on_finish":true,"fanout_subagents":true}. Full override: {"executor_thinking":"xhigh","heartbeat_max_runs":100,"notify_on_finish":false,"fanout_subagents":false}. Booleans are unquoted, nulls are bare, strings are quoted. Valid JSON.

script_checks.name: emit_config_requires_only_run_id_root
script_checks.evidence: --emit-config without --run-id exits 1; --emit-config without --root exits 1. Default prompt mode without --phase exits 1; without --skill exits 1. The guard is 'if [ "$emit_config" -eq 0 ]; then require --phase/--skill; fi' — emit-config path bypasses those checks correctly.

script_checks.name: default_prompt_embeds_new_fields
script_checks.evidence: grep output: 'workspace:{kind:"worktree"}' from subagent_workspace=worktree; 'Executor backend: claude/opus-4-7 (paseo claude sub-agent; mode bypassPermissions' from executor_provider+executor_mode; 'Reviewer provider/mode/thinking are fixed by the run's paseo-config.json — do not override.' All embedded.

script_checks.name: edge_cases_handled
script_checks.evidence: (1) Absent CLAUDE.md: exits 0, emits defaults JSON. (2) CLAUDE.md present, no ## ARIS Paseo block: exits 0, emits defaults JSON. (3) Trailing comment (# override for this run): executor_mode parsed as 'bypassPermissions' correctly. (4) Inside ```yaml fence: orchestrator_provider='claude/opus-4-8', executor_provider='claude/opus-4-7' parsed correctly — grep-based read_var matches plain key:value lines regardless of fence context.

script_checks.name: exit_codes_correct
script_checks.evidence: missing run-id exit=1, missing run-id emit-config exit=1, missing skill exit=1. All error paths exit non-zero. Success paths exit 0.

orchestrator_checks.name: emits_config_once
orchestrator_checks.evidence: SKILL.md line 89-91: 'Resolve the W-agent prompt renderer + emit the run config ONCE ... CONFIG=$(bash "$RENDER" --emit-config ...)'. Step 2 says 'Read this JSON once and hold it for the whole run'.

orchestrator_checks.name: dispatch_reads_all_fields_from_CFG
orchestrator_checks.evidence: Lines 235-243: workspace:{kind:<CFG.subagent_workspace>}, provider:<CFG.executor_provider>, settings:{modeId:<CFG.executor_mode>, thinkingOptionId:<CFG.executor_thinking>}, notifyOnFinish:<CFG.notify_on_finish>. Lines 255-256: reviewer provider/mode/thinking from same CFG. All 5 create_agent fields covered.

orchestrator_checks.name: no_leftover_literal_refs
orchestrator_checks.evidence: grep for $executor_provider|$reviewer_provider|$executor_mode|$reviewer_mode|$executor_thinking|$reviewer_thinking|$subagent_workspace|$notify_on_finish|$fanout_subagents|$orchestrator_provider in SKILL.md returned exit 1 (no matches). All refs are CFG.* now.

orchestrator_checks.name: null_thinking_handled
orchestrator_checks.evidence: Line 241: '(omit thinkingOptionId when CFG.executor_thinking is null — model default)'. Line 257: '(omit thinkingOptionId when null)' for reviewer. Script emits bare 'null' for empty executor_thinking in JSON.

orchestrator_checks.name: reviewer_uses_same_CFG
orchestrator_checks.evidence: Lines 252-256: 'Reviewer sub-agents (spawned by the W-agents, not the orchestrator) read the SAME $CFG for reviewer_provider / reviewer_mode / reviewer_thinking — the executor prompt embeds these and points at paseo-reviewer-dispatch.md'. Prompt output confirms: 'Reviewer provider/mode/thinking are fixed by the run's paseo-config.json'.

orchestrator_checks.name: no_regression_constants_gates_fence
orchestrator_checks.evidence: All 11 constants intact (lines 47-57): AUTO_PROCEED, ARXIV_DOWNLOAD, HUMAN_CHECKPOINT, REVIEWER_DIFFICULTY, CODE_REVIEW, BASE_REPO, COMPACT, AUTO_WRITE, VENUE, RENDER_HTML, RESUMABLE. Acceptance-authority table intact (lines 146-152): all 5 phases. The fence restated (line 165): forbids recreating W2/W3, send_agent_prompt to running verdict agent, calling accept/quality verdicts from heartbeat. Resumable runs section intact (line 116). verify_paper_audits.sh referenced (lines 466-468).

summary: Fix is correct, complete, and regression-free. All 12 paseo variables now parsed and emitted as JSON; orchestrator dispatch reads every create_agent field from $CFG (not prose). Edge cases (absent CLAUDE.md, absent block, trailing comments, yaml fence) all handled. No leftover $var literals. 11 constants, acceptance table, fence, and resume model all intact. 1 minor issue: heartbeat_cron quote preservation.

second_pass.evidence: heartbeat_cron with double quotes parsed as */13 * * * * (no double-encoding). executor_mode with double quotes -> bypassPermissions. reviewer_provider with single quotes -> codex/deepseek-v4-pro. Unquoted cron still works. Defaults produce all 12 vars.
second_pass.over_stripping_evidence: claude/opus-4-8, claude/sonnet-4-6, codex/gpt-5.5 all preserved with internal slashes intact. */13 * * * * preserved with asterisks and slashes.
second_pass.fix_lines: sed -E ... s/^"(.*)"$/\1/; s/^'(.*)'$/\1/ -- strips one surrounding pair of matching quotes only.
